FILE_TOO_LARGE: File size exceeds maximum allowed size of {maxSizeMB}MB.
FILE_TYPE_NOT_ALLOWED: File type not allowed. Allowed types: {types}.
MIME_NOT_ALLOWED: MIME type '{mimeType}' is not allowed for this file type.
CONTENT_MISMATCH: File content does not match the declared file type. Possible file type mismatch or corrupted file.
